input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.3
            TITLE: endurance run order

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.3: Endurance Run Order
D.12.3 Endurance Run Order 
The Endurance Run Order is established to let vehicles of similar speed potential be on track 
together to reduce the need for passing.

RULE: d.12.3.2
            TITLE: each team must keep track of the endurance run order and have their vehicle fueled, in line

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.3.2: Each team must keep track of the Endurance Run Order and have their vehicle fueled, in line
D.12.3.2 Each team must keep track of the Endurance Run Order and have their vehicle fueled, in line 
and prepared to start when their turn to run arrives.

RULE: d.12.3.1
            TITLE: the endurance run order:

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.3.1: The Endurance Run Order:
D.12.3.1 The Endurance Run Order:  
a. Should be primarily based on the Autocross event finish order 
b. Should include the teams eligible for Endurance which did not compete in the Autocross 
event.   
c. May be altered by the organizer to accommodate specific circumstances or event 
considerations

final_answer: rule D.12.3: Endurance Run Order D.12.3 Endurance Run Order The Endurance Run Order is established to let vehicles of similar speed potential be on track together to reduce the need for passing.
